title: Interstate Highway Construction Loan
description: The federal government is building 41,000 miles of highways. Construction firms need $50M in credit lines.

title: Suburban Housing Development
description: Levittown-style developments need mortgage origination for 500 homes.

title: War Bond Rollover Program
description: Maturing war bonds need to be rolled into treasury securities. Handle $200M in transitions.

title: Department Store Credit Account
description: A major retailer wants a revolving credit program for 100,000 customers.

title: Marshall Plan Trade Finance
description: European reconstruction creates demand for trade finance and letters of credit.
